title: substitute

messages.description: any message to have elements substituted or not
sets the 1st element to be substituted by the 2nd
the substituted message if a substitution occurred
the input message if no substitution occurred

arguments.description: the match element that should be replaced
any float or symbol sets substitute to "first only" mode

methods.description: sets the 1st element to be substituted by the 2nd (other elements are ignored)

body: [substitute] exchanges an element (the first argument) in an input message to another one (second argument).
